nodes.context: Mob-like organization in Hanoi's underworld, led by Khánh Trắng, involved in extortion, murder, tax evasion.
Gang controlling Long Bien market area, led by Hung Cuba.

edges.evidence_quote: Khanh attempted to negotiate with Hung Cuba for control over these areas, but the two didn't come to an agreement. In response, Khanh had his men block all of the routes to the bus station and Long Bien market. Unable to transport or receive any of his goods from shippers, Hung Cuba was forced to submit to Khanh's will.
edges.context: Khanh's organization forced Hung Cuba's group to submit after a failed negotiation, then merged the two groups.
